scripts.deploy:local: npm run compile && HOME=$PWD/.home XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/.xdg/config XDG_DATA_HOME=$PWD/.xdg/data npx hardhat run --no-compile scripts/runDeployLocal.js --network hardhat
scripts.test: npm run compile && HOME=$PWD/.home XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/.xdg/config XDG_DATA_HOME=$PWD/.xdg/data npx hardhat test --no-compile
